Auto-set by 'Create fixed-width spec' test script
Auto-set by 'Create XML spec' test script
Auto-set by 'File to events' and 'Schedule' test scripts

info.description:
Local development environment for Transform Platform.

Prerequisites:
  1. Start Docker dependencies: docker compose -f .docker/docker-compose.yml up -d
  2. Start the app (IntelliJ or: ./gradlew :platform-api:bootRun)
  3. Select this environment in Postman before sending requests.

Variables csvSpecId, fixedWidthSpecId, xmlSpecId, correlationId are populated
automatically by test scripts in the Create/Transform requests.
